jobs.title: Customer Analytics Manager, Activations & Adoption
jobs.content: <p><strong>About SimpliSafe</strong></p><p>SimpliSafe is the dominant DIY wireless home-security-as-a-service platform pioneered around the self-install professionally-monitored security data model.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Automation Engineer (Firmware)
jobs.content: <p>Lead SimpliSafe's firmware automation across the wireless home-security platform & smart-home ecosystem.</p>
